---
title: "Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead"
---

## Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1822/3-1869)

### Description

father of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

Brother of the Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead, he was first cousin to WCY and to the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch.  Described as half-pay captain Royal Artillery in 1861 census, he married (1843) Charlotte Story (1823/4-1888).

### Letters

- Letter from April 22nd [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
